infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vital Lens uses the camera to log workouts, meals, kitchen ingredients, and optional body progress photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vital Lens lets you choose photos for AI-assisted wellness logging.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Vital Lens can add wellness events to your calendar when you request it.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Vital Lens needs calendar access only to add wellness events that you request.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Vital Lens can add wellness events to your calendar when you request it.
